files.patch:

           fi

-        with:
-          version: 0.15.2
-
-      - name: Setup Node.js

         with:
           node-version: '20'
-

-          sudo apt-get install -y llvm-20 llvm-20-dev clang-20 lld-20
-          sudo ln -sf /usr/bin/llvm-config-20 /usr/bin/llvm-config
-

-        run: zig build -Doptimize=ReleaseFast
+          build-test262: 'true'
 
       - name: Generate shard bundle
